extraction.one_line_summary: IMPEY Daryl won a reduced bunch sprint after categorized climbs dropped pure sprinters, beating Matthews and Küng after Bettiol's leadout died early.
tactical_patterns: EF Education deployed full domestique squad including Uran on final climb to position Bettiol, revealing sprint-climber stage strategy.
Williams distanced on Cat-2 climb but recovered over summit, showing GC contenders vulnerable before peak rather than at it.
Krónin attacked for time bonuses within sprint despite holding white jersey, indicating GC ambitions beyond youth classification.

rider_signals.IMPEY Daryl: positive: first World Tour win since 2019 TdF Stage 9, showing late-career resurgence on sprint-climber stages at 37
rider_signals.BETTIOL Alberto: negative: leadout died early despite full team support on uphill finish, suggesting form issues or poor timing
rider_signals.WILLIAMS Stephen: neutral: momentarily distanced on Cat-2 climb but recovered quickly, indicating threshold fitness rather than climbing weakness
rider_signals.KÜNG Stefan: positive: third place on uphill sprint finish against puncheurs reveals unexpected climbing speed for time trialist
